nasb.text: To vindicate the orphan and the oppressed, So that man who is of the earth will no longer cause terror.

esv.text: to do justice to the fatherless and the oppressed, so that man who is of the earth may strike terror no more.

cnv.text: 好為孤兒和受欺壓的人伸冤， 使地上的人不再施行恐嚇。

ccb.text: 你为孤儿和受欺压的人申冤， 使渺小的世人不能再恐吓他们。

csbs.text: 要为孤儿和被压迫的人伸冤， 使地上的人绝不再恐吓他们。
